steps.title: Insert the examples smoothly
steps.content: The three seasons and years identify the temporal spaces. Parentheses can place those examples inside the noun phrase while allowing the sentence to continue with that.

steps.title: Avoid broken punctuation
steps.content: B mixes a dash with an unmatched parenthesis. C inserts a period that breaks the sentence before that. D gives the examples without a needed punctuation boundary. Parentheses correctly contain the examples. The answer is A.
